fields.description:
Cliente relata que o mix de clientes não está sendo exibido em um cliente específico (19108), gostaria de tirar algumas dúvidas em relação à execução da job que gera os dados do mix.

 

Login para teste:

nbove.adrianoalves
fields.customfield_10221: Entrar na base do vendedor, iniciar um pedido no cliente 19108 e verificar o mix do cliente.

comments.body: SELECT DADOS.CODCLI, DADOS.CODPROD, DADOS.CODAUXILIAR, DADOS.CODFILIAL, DADOS.NUMTRANSVENDA, PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA, PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG, PCNFSAID.CODCOB, AVG (PCMOV.PTABELA) PTABELA, NVL (AVG (PCMOV.PUNIT), 0) PUNIT, SUM (PCMOV.QT) QT, DADOS.PLPAGDESCRICAO FROM ( SELECT PCNFSAID.CODCLI, PCPRODUT.CODPROD, NVL (NVL (PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR, PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR), -1) CODAUXILIAR, PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL, MAX (PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA) NUMTRANSVENDA, NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO1,NULL,'''', PCNFSAID.PRAZO1) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO2,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO2) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO3,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO3) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO4,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO4) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO5,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO5) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO6,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO6) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO7,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO7) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO8,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO8) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO9,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO9) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO10,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO10) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO11,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO11) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO12,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO12), PCPLPAG.DESCRICAO) PLPAGDESCRICAO FROM [#USUARIOERP#].PCNFSAID, [#USUARIOERP#].PCPRODUT, [#USUARIOERP#].PCMOV, [#USUARIOERP#].PCCLIENT, [#USUARIOERP#].PCUSUARI, [#USUARIOERP#].PCPLPAG, [#USUARIOERP#].PCFORNEC WHERE PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA = PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA AND PCMOV.CODPROD = PCPRODUT.CODPROD AND PCNFSAID.CODCLI = PCCLIENT.CODCLI AND PCFORNEC.CODFORNEC = PCPRODUT.CODFORNEC AND PCNFSAID.CODUSUR = PCUSUARI.CODUSUR AND PCMOV.CODOPER NOT IN (''SA'', ''SI'', ''SR'') AND PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG = PCPLPAG.CODPLPAG AND PCNFSAID.CODFISCAL NOT IN (522, 622, 722, 532, 632, 732) AND PCNFSAID.CONDVENDA NOT IN (4, 8, 10, 13, 20, 98, 99) AND (PCNFSAID.DTCANCEL IS NULL) AND PCCLIENT.DTEXCLUSAO IS NULL AND PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA > (TRUNC (SYSDATE) - :PNUMDIAS) AND PCMOV.CODFILIAL = PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL VPARAMSQUERY GROUP BY PCNFSAID.CODCLI, PCPRODUT.CODPROD, NVL (NVL (PCMOV.CODAUXILIAR, PCPRODUT.CODAUXILIAR), -1), PCNFSAID.CODFILIAL, NVL(DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO1,NULL,'''', PCNFSAID.PRAZO1) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO2,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO2) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO3,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO3) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO4,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO4) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO5,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO5) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO6,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO6) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO7,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO7) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO8,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO8) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO9,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO9) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO10,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO10) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO11,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO11) || DECODE(PCNFSAID.PRAZO12,NULL,'''', '' / '' || PCNFSAID.PRAZO12), PCPLPAG.DESCRICAO)) DADOS, [#USUARIOERP#].PCNFSAID, [#USUARIOERP#].PCMOV WHERE PCMOV.NUMTRANSVENDA = DADOS.NUMTRANSVENDA AND PCMOV.CODPROD = DADOS.CODPROD AND PCNFSAID.NUMTRANSVENDA = DADOS.NUMTRANSVENDA AND PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG IS NOT NULL AND PCNFSAID.CODCOB IS NOT NULL AND PCMOV.PTABELA IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DADOS.CODCLI, DADOS.CODPROD, DADOS.CODAUXILIAR, DADOS.CODFILIAL, DADOS.NUMTRANSVENDA, PCNFSAID.DTSAIDA, PCNFSAID.CODPLPAG, PCNFSAID.CODCOB, DADOS.PLPAGDESCRICAO ORDER BY DADOS.CODCLI, DADOS.CODPROD';
